title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.2711 - Noncompliance, effect of
text:
67.2711.  Noncompliance, effect of. — In the event a video service provider is found by a court of competent jurisdiction to be in noncompliance with the requirements of sections 67.2675 to 67.2714, the court shall issue an order to the video service provider directing a cure for such noncompliance within a specified reasonable period of time.  If the video service provider meets the requirements of the provisions of sections 67.2675 to 67.2714 within the court-ordered period of time, the court shall dismiss the claim of noncompliance.
(L. 2007 S.B. 284)
